purpose: Select, install, verify, and promote external tools by governed job profile rather than ad hoc dependency use.
invariants: Install only into isolated /mnt/data workspaces unless an OS promotion gate approves embedding.
Never mutate the canonical OS root with node_modules or package manager caches.
Every install profile must include package list, pinned versions where possible, lockfile hash, install log hash, smoke test, receipt, and rollback path.
A tool is usable only after require/command resolution and a task-specific smoke test pass.
Promotion into an authority ZIP requires archive safety scan, duplicate scan, CRC proof, checksum sidecar, and boot smoke when boot-critical.
If a package manager or network route fails, record the failure class and prefer already verified working routes.

required_packages.name: yauzl
required_packages.role: central-directory ZIP reader and stream opener

A_ZIP_AUTHORITY_REPAIR.promotion_rule: Promote only if rebuilt ZIP has sha256 sidecar, full streamed CRC proof PASS, and boot smoke PASS_WITH_WARNINGS or stronger.
